productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Surf Black White Flip Flop
description: This absolutely stylish pair of Surf flip flops from puma comes with an absolutely comfortable footbed and classic stitch detailing coupled with a velvety inner along the synthetic red straps, offering a fantabulous combination of comfort and style. The TPR outsole with circular grooves ensures great grip on damp surfaces, making it a great beachwear and pool side slipper.Upper Fabric upper for dry comfort of the feet Thong straps with stitch detailing and padded inner for durability and comfortable wear Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and style Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort puma cat logo on the footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
